llm_response:
# Inquiry Regarding Access to Historical Medical Records

## Dear Records Department Team,

I am writing to formally request copies of my father's medical records from your facility dated back to the year 2002. These specific medical records are essential for me to understand his long-term health history and current condition accurately. I need these medical records to assist our current healthcare providers in making informed decisions about his ongoing treatment plan effectively. Please let me know the exact process required to obtain these vital records without any unnecessary delay or confusion.

To proceed with this request, I will need to provide the following documents:
*   A valid government-issued photo identification card
*   A signed authorization form from my father
*   Proof of my relationship to the patient listed

You can find additional forms on the [facility website](https://example.com/forms). I appreciate your time and assistance in this matter greatly. Thank you for your prompt attention to this important request regarding my father's care.

Sincerely,
John Doe
